name: Cognition and mobility in older adults at Alzheimer's disease risk
summary: Functional and biomarker outcome from the 2025 single-arm D+Q pilot; the PubMed abstract gives exact MoCA, baseline-MoCA subgroup, TNF-alpha, and TNF-alpha/MoCA correlation values, while broader mobility endpoint values still require full article extraction.
measurement_method: Montreal Cognitive Assessment, functional assessments, and TNF-alpha biomarker percent change
timepoint: Baseline to completion of 12-week intermittent D+Q course
population_or_model: Older adults at risk for Alzheimer's disease

provenance.locator: PubMed PMID 40010154 abstract METHODS and FINDINGS
provenance.note: Abstract identifies MoCA, functional outcomes, and TNF-alpha biomarker change as extracted endpoints.
